The Grainy Transmission, otherwise known as Wagstaff, is an NPC exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in the Return of Them. He can be found in the Moonstorms that spawn after the Mysterious Energy is created. He reappears after the Celestial Champion's final phase is defeated.

Wagstaff is available as a playable character in Don't Starve.

Moonstorm Quest

Wagstaff in containment process.

Upon players entering a moonstorm for the first time, he will approach them and drop the blueprints for Astroggles and the Incomplete Experiment. If there are multiple players nearby he will drop blueprints for each.

Wearing Astroggles will show an indicator on the edge of the screen pointing to Wagstaff's current location if he is nearby.

He will appear somewhere in the moonstorm and run a short distance before disappearing when approached. Once followed four times, he will appear with a machine with 100 health and trying to contain a energetic static. Moonblind Crows and Misshapen Birds will land in flocks and approach Wagstaff in an attempt to prevent the containment of the moonstorm energy. If the container takes over 100 damage the containment will fail and he will disappear requiring the player to track him down again. After the containing process success, he will leave a Restrained Static and disappear.

Wagstaff will periodically ask for one of five tools, which will spawn around him during the containment process. Most characters will not be able to identify the tools, however Winona will be able to see the proper name when moused over the item. After the correct tool is given to Wagstaff it will respawn nearby a few moments later. All tools will vanish when the containment process ends, regardless of outcome.

Lunar Essence Extractor

After the defeat of the Celestial Champion, Wagstaff appears near its remains with the Lunar Essence Extractor, which he uses to house energy taken from the Celestial Champion. The first time this happens and any subsequent times while the Lunar Rifts are not activated, Wagstaff asks players for an Enlightened Shard in order to activate the Lunar Rifts. A player must first show the shard to Wagstaff, and offer it to him afterwards. A message pops up warning the player and asking for confirmation. Once confirmed, Lunar Rifts are activated.

After the player gives Wagstaff an Enlightened Shard or after a two minutes (1/4 of a day), he and the Lunar Essence Extractor fade away. If Lunar Rifts are already active, Wagstaff does not ask for an Enlightened Shard after subsequent Celestial Champion fights, and simply fades away moments after housing Celestial Champion's energy.

If Wagstaff was not given an Enlightened Shard after the Celestial Champion fight, he and the Lunar Essence Extractor show up randomly throughout the world, giving players another chance to give him an Enlightened Shard and activate Lunar Rifts without having to fight Celestial Champion again.

W.A.R.B.I.S. Quest

Main article: Abandoned Junk

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Once Lunar Rifts have been activated, a first set of Abandoned Junk spawns in the Junk Yard after 4-7 days along with Research Notes. Wagstaff then periodically appears next to a player for a few moments, talking and running toward where the Abandoned Junk spawned. Destroying these structures provides players with Scrap and a chance for the Rare Blueprints for W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear, W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor, and the Auto-Mat-O-Chanic. When a set of Abandoned Junk is destroyed, another spawns after 4-7 days.

W.A.R.B.O.T. Quest

This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift

Lunar-mutated Bosses

Main article: Spark Ark

In the Research Notes, the player can find that Deerclopses, Beargers and Vargs can mutate. After defeating one of them, it will be revived turn into its lunar-mutated version. After defeating the new version of the boss, the Grainy Transmission appears and asks the player to defeat more of them, in order for him to conduct his research. Once all three mutated bosses have been defeated (Armored Bearger, Crystal Deerclops, and Possessed Varg), Wagstaff rewards the player with a Spark Ark. Afterward, Wagstaff drops a Spark Ark for each boss defeated, but they must still be cycled through.

Hermit Island

Main article: Hermit Island#Wagstaff Questline

After all three mutated bosses have been defeated at least once, Wagstaff will appear on the Hermit Island with the Notional Fabricator and some Junk Piles and Junky Fences. He will ask the player to evict the Crabby Hermit by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island. The player can get one by giving a Map Scroll, crafted at the Cartographer's Desk after exploring Moon Quay Island, to the Grainy Transmission. After giving the Crabby Hermit the Map of Totally Uninhabited Island, she, alongside her Hermit Home, Hermit Drying Racks and Hermit Bee Boxes, will teleport to the Moon Quay.

Helping Wagstaff

After evicting the Crabby Hermit, the Grainy Transmission will ask the player to craft Substrate Extrapolators and place them on marked areas of ocean. After the player places all 76 Substrate Extrapolators, the Grainy Transmission will unlock the recipe for Phasmo-Encapsulators at the Notional Fabricator and ask for six encapsulated Gestalts. Further, W.A.R.B.O.T. will appear on the island.

The player needs to catch 6 Gestalts (which can be Gestalts, Greater Gestalts or Grazers) with the Phasmo-Encapsulator. Wagstaff will place them around W.A.R.B.O.T., creating a Terramite for every Gestalt and a Warbler for every Greater Gestalt or Grazer. The player will need at least 1 encapsulated Gestalt that will become a Terramite and 1 that will become a Warbler.

After giving the Grainy Transmission the sixth encapsulated Gestalt, the Celestial Revenant will fall from the sky. Upon defeating it, the player needs to catch its defeated corpse with the Phasmo-Encapsulator and give it to the Grainy Transmission.

After giving the Grainy Transmission the encapsulated Celestial Revenant, the Fulcronial Selector appears, which summons Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T. as a boss when activated.

Trivia

  • The Grainy Transmission was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.
  • If you spawn Wagstaff or Wagstaff's tools by commands, they will glow at night.
  • WX-78 highly resents Wagstaff given their background, as seen in their examination quotes. They also warn the Lunar Siphonator that he can't be trusted.
  • In a world with the Winter's Feast event active, Wagstaff will drop a unique Magnificent Adornment of the potato contained in the Astroggles after the Celestial Champion fight.

After the defeat of the Celestial Champion, Wagstaff appears near its remains with the Lunar Essence Extractor, which he uses to house energy taken from the Celestial Champion. The first time this happens and any subsequent times while the Lunar Rifts are not activated, Wagstaff asks players for an Enlightened Shard in order to activate the Lunar Rifts. A player must first show the shard to Wagstaff, and offer it to him afterwards. A message pops up warning the player and asking for confirmation. Once confirmed, Lunar Rifts are activated.
After the player gives Wagstaff an Enlightened Shard or after a two minutes (1/4 of a day), he and the Lunar Essence Extractor fade away. If Lunar Rifts are already active, Wagstaff does not ask for an Enlightened Shard after subsequent Celestial Champion fights, and simply fades away moments after housing Celestial Champion's energy.
If Wagstaff was not given an Enlightened Shard after the Celestial Champion fight, he and the Lunar Essence Extractor show up randomly throughout the world, giving players another chance to give him an Enlightened Shard and activate Lunar Rifts without having to fight Celestial Champion again.

W.A.R.B.I.S. Quest[edit | edit source]
Main article: Abandoned Junk
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Once Lunar Rifts have been activated, a first set of Abandoned Junk spawns in the Junk Yard after 4-7 days along with Research Notes. Wagstaff then periodically appears next to a player for a few moments, talking and running toward where the Abandoned Junk spawned. Destroying these structures provides players with Scrap and a chance for the Rare Blueprints for W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear, W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor, and the Auto-Mat-O-Chanic. When a set of Abandoned Junk is destroyed, another spawns after 4-7 days.
W.A.R.B.O.T. Quest[edit | edit source]
This content is available only after activating the Lunar Rift
Lunar-mutated Bosses[edit | edit source]
Main article: Spark Ark
In the Research Notes, the player can find that Deerclopses, Beargers and Vargs can mutate. After defeating one of them, it will be revived turn into its lunar-mutated version. After defeating the new version of the boss, the Grainy Transmission appears and asks the player to defeat more of them, in order for him to conduct his research. Once all three mutated bosses have been defeated (Armored Bearger, Crystal Deerclops, and Possessed Varg), Wagstaff rewards the player with a Spark Ark. Afterward, Wagstaff drops a Spark Ark for each boss defeated, but they must still be cycled through.
Hermit Island[edit | edit source]
Main article: Hermit Island#Wagstaff Questline
After all three mutated bosses have been defeated at least once, Wagstaff will appear on the Hermit Island with the Notional Fabricator and some Junk Piles and Junky Fences. He will ask the player to evict the Crabby Hermit by giving her a Map of Totally Uninhabited Island. The player can get one by giving a Map Scroll, crafted at the Cartographer's Desk after exploring Moon Quay Island, to the Grainy Transmission. After giving the Crabby Hermit the Map of Totally Uninhabited Island, she, alongside her Hermit Home, Hermit Drying Racks and Hermit Bee Boxes, will teleport to the Moon Quay.
Helping Wagstaff[edit | edit source]
After evicting the Crabby Hermit, the Grainy Transmission will ask the player to craft Substrate Extrapolators and place them on marked areas of ocean. After the player places all 76 Substrate Extrapolators, the Grainy Transmission will unlock the recipe for Phasmo-Encapsulators at the Notional Fabricator and ask for six encapsulated Gestalts. Further, W.A.R.B.O.T. will appear on the island.
The player needs to catch 6 Gestalts (which can be Gestalts, Greater Gestalts or Grazers) with the Phasmo-Encapsulator. Wagstaff will place them around W.A.R.B.O.T., creating a Terramite for every Gestalt and a Warbler for every Greater Gestalt or Grazer. The player will need at least 1 encapsulated Gestalt that will become a Terramite and 1 that will become a Warbler.
After giving the Grainy Transmission the sixth encapsulated Gestalt, the Celestial Revenant will fall from the sky. Upon defeating it, the player needs to catch its defeated corpse with the Phasmo-Encapsulator and give it to the Grainy Transmission.
After giving the Grainy Transmission the encapsulated Celestial Revenant, the Fulcronial Selector appears, which summons Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T. as a boss when activated.

Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Grainy Transmission was introduced in the Eye of the Storm update.
If you spawn Wagstaff or Wagstaff's tools by commands, they will glow at night.
WX-78 highly resents Wagstaff given their background, as seen in their examination quotes. They also warn the Lunar Siphonator that he can't be trusted.
In a world with the Winter's Feast event active, Wagstaff will drop a unique Magnificent Adornment of the potato contained in the Astroggles after the Celestial Champion fight.

He can be found in the [[Moonstorm]]s that spawn after the [[Mysterious Energy]] is created. He reappears after the [[Celestial Champion]]'s final phase is defeated. Wagstaff is available as a playable character in ''[[Don't Starve]]''. == Moonstorm Quest == [[File:Wendy help Wagstaff in moonstorm.png|thumb|Wagstaff in containment process.]] Upon players entering a moonstorm for the first time, he will approach them and drop the blueprints for [[Astroggles]] and the [[Lunar Siphonator|Incomplete Experiment]]. If there are multiple players nearby he will drop blueprints for each. Wearing Astroggles will show an indicator on the edge of the screen pointing to Wagstaff's current location if he is nearby. He will appear somewhere in the moonstorm and run a short distance before disappearing when approached. Once followed four times, he will appear with a machine with 100 health and trying to contain a energetic static. [[Moonblind Crow]]s and [[Misshapen Bird]]s will land in flocks and approach Wagstaff in an attempt to prevent the containment of the moonstorm energy. If the container takes over 100 damage the containment will fail and he will disappear requiring the player to track him down again. After the containing process success, he will leave a [[Restrained Static]] and disappear. Wagstaff will periodically ask for one of five tools, which will spawn around him during the containment process. Most characters will not be able to identify the tools, however [[Winona]] will be able to see the proper name when moused over the item. After the correct tool is given to Wagstaff it will respawn nearby a few moments later. It seems he has some tricks up his sleeve. |wurt = What that thing for? |walter = Wow, we sure are lucky he happened to have that with him! |wanda = I should have known it would happen like this again. |choose = wx78 |source = when examining the Lunar Essence Extractor }} After the defeat of the [[Celestial Champion]], Wagstaff appears near its remains with the '''Lunar Essence Extractor''', which he uses to house energy taken from the Celestial Champion. The first time this happens and any subsequent times while the [[Lunar Rift]]s are not activated, Wagstaff asks players for an [[Enlightened Shard]] in order to activate the Lunar Rifts. A player must first show the shard to Wagstaff, and offer it to him afterwards. A message pops up warning the player and asking for confirmation. Once confirmed, Lunar Rifts are activated. After the player gives Wagstaff an Enlightened Shard or after a two minutes (1/4 of a day), he and the Lunar Essence Extractor fade away. If Lunar Rifts are already active, Wagstaff does not ask for an Enlightened Shard after subsequent Celestial Champion fights, and simply fades away moments after housing Celestial Champion's energy. If Wagstaff was not given an Enlightened Shard after the Celestial Champion fight, he and the Lunar Essence Extractor show up randomly throughout the world, giving players another chance to give him an Enlightened Shard and activate Lunar Rifts without having to fight Celestial Champion again. === {{Pic32|Research Notes}} Assets === Lunar Essence Extractor Idle.gif|close idle Lunar Essence Extractor Collect.gif|collect {{Clear}} == W.A.R.B.I.S. Quest == {{Main|Abandoned Junk}} {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} Once Lunar Rifts have been activated, a first set of [[Abandoned Junk]] spawns in the [[Junk Yard]] after 4-7 days along with [[Research Notes]]. Wagstaff then periodically appears next to a player for a few moments, talking and running toward where the Abandoned Junk spawned. Destroying these structures provides players with [[Scrap]] and a chance for the Rare Blueprints for [[W.A.R.B.I.S. Head Gear]], [[W.A.R.B.I.S. Armor]], and the [[Auto-Mat-O-Chanic]]. When a set of Abandoned Junk is destroyed, another spawns after 4-7 days. == W.A.R.B.O.T. Quest == {{Rift Content|Lunar Rift}} ===Lunar-mutated Bosses=== {{Main|Spark Ark}} In the [[Research Notes]], the player can find that [[Deerclops]]es, [[Bearger]]s and [[Varg]]s can mutate. After defeating one of them, it will be revived turn into its lunar-mutated version. After defeating the new version of the boss, the Grainy Transmission appears and asks the player to defeat more of them, in order for him to conduct his research. Once all three mutated bosses have been defeated ([[Armored Bearger]], [[Crystal Deerclops]], and [[Possessed Varg]]), Wagstaff rewards the player with a [[Spark Ark]]. Afterward, Wagstaff drops a Spark Ark for each boss defeated, but they must still be cycled through. === Hermit Island === {{Main|Hermit Island#Wagstaff Questline}} After all three mutated bosses have been defeated at least once, Wagstaff will appear on the [[Hermit Island]] with the [[Notional Fabricator]] and some [[Junk Pile]]s and [[Junky Fence]]s. He will ask the player to evict the [[Crabby Hermit]] by giving her a [[Map of Totally Uninhabited Island]]. The player can get one by giving a [[Map Scroll]], crafted at the [[Cartographer's Desk]] after exploring [[Moon Quay|Moon Quay Island]], to the Grainy Transmission. After giving the Crabby Hermit the Map of Totally Uninhabited Island, she, alongside her [[Hermit Home]], [[Hermit Drying Rack]]s and [[Hermit Bee Box]]es, will teleport to the [[Moon Quay]]. === Helping Wagstaff === After evicting the [[Crabby Hermit]], the Grainy Transmission will ask the player to craft [[Substrate Extrapolator]]s and place them on marked areas of ocean. After the player places all 76 [[Substrate Extrapolator]]s, the Grainy Transmission will unlock the recipe for [[Phasmo-Encapsulator]]s at the [[Notional Fabricator]] and ask for six [[Phasmo-Encapsulator|encapsulated]] [[Gestalt]]s. Further, [[W.A.R.B.O.T.]] will appear on the island. The player needs to catch 6 Gestalts (which can be [[Gestalt]]s, [[Greater Gestalt]]s or [[Grazer]]s) with the [[Phasmo-Encapsulator]]. Wagstaff will place them around W.A.R.B.O.T., creating a [[Terramite]] for every Gestalt and a [[Warbler]] for every [[Greater Gestalt]] or [[Grazer]]. The player will need at least 1 encapsulated Gestalt that will become a Terramite and 1 that will become a Warbler. After giving the Grainy Transmission the sixth encapsulated Gestalt, the [[Celestial Revenant]] will fall from the sky. Upon defeating it, the player needs to catch its defeated corpse with the [[Phasmo-Encapsulator]] and give it to the Grainy Transmission. After giving the Grainy Transmission the encapsulated Celestial Revenant, the [[Fulcronial Selector]] appears, which summons [[Enlightened W.A.R.B.O.T.]] as a boss when activated. =={{Pic|32|Gramophone}} Quotes== {{col-begin}} {{col-2}} ===Celestial Champion Quest=== '''Meeting the player for the first time in a Moonstorm''' * You!
